evidence_refs.source_quote: Newsletter 1 / Fall 2011
Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Avenues through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT).
